purpose: Run a request-linked maker path from Slack intake through normalized intake, spec composition, private build request, validation summary, and reply artifact.

statuses.built: Private runtime command executed and returned artifact refs.
statuses.ready_for_private_build_execution: Request is normalized and spec is composed; private build is ready but execution was not requested.
statuses.blocked: Entitlement, connector, intake, approval, or private runtime readiness blocked the build.
statuses.needs_review: Intake normalized with clarification or review requirements before unattended delivery.

blocked_reply_requirements: do not claim a deck was delivered
asset_boundary: Use normalized approved manifest or metadata IDs only; do not scan external raw folders.
